response.global_analysis: 1. No Vocal Music: The audio consists entirely of gameplay commentary and voice acting between the players. 2. Manual Transcription: Fully transcribed the Japanese and English commentary, including interactions with Korone. 3. Timing: Synchronized precisely with the spoken dialogue to match the fast-paced gameplay and speech transitions.

subtitles.original: サンタ？
subtitles.english: Santa?

subtitles.original: サンタ？
subtitles.english: Santa?

subtitles.original: サンタ？
subtitles.english: Santa?

subtitles.original: ほうほうほう
subtitles.english: Ho, ho, ho!

subtitles.original: サンタ！久しぶり！
subtitles.english: Santa! It's been a while!

subtitles.original: 久しぶり！見て！
subtitles.english: Long time no see! Look!

subtitles.original: あっ！
subtitles.english: Ah!

subtitles.original: あー！タコダチ！
subtitles.english: Ah! Takodachi!

subtitles.original: ここにも飾っておくよ
subtitles.english: I'll display one here too!

subtitles.original: ありがとう、サンタ！
subtitles.english: Thank you, Santa!

subtitles.original: サンタ！
subtitles.english: Santa!

subtitles.original: ほうほうほう
subtitles.english: Ho, ho, ho!

subtitles.original: ほうほうほう
subtitles.english: Ho, ho, ho!

subtitles.original: タコダチ...
subtitles.english: Takodachi...

subtitles.original: Why are you standing up though? Aren't you... aren't... aren't you an item? Aren't you supposed to be lying down?
subtitles.english: Why are you standing up though? Aren't you... aren't... aren't you an item? Aren't you supposed to be lying down?

subtitles.original: Well, I'm not against it.
subtitles.english: Well, I'm not against it.

subtitles.original: なんか、ししろんが「アイテム交換しないように、開けるの禁止です」と言ったとき、
subtitles.english: You know, when Shishiron said, "To prevent item trading, opening them is prohibited,"

subtitles.original: あ、サンタのプレゼントももらえないと思ったんですけど。
subtitles.english: I thought, "Ah, I won't be able to get presents from Santa anymore."

subtitles.original: そうですね、サンタって最初から、
subtitles.english: But then, Santa from the start...

subtitles.original: 私が見てないところにプレゼントを置いていくのがサンタの仕事。
subtitles.english: leaving presents where I'm not looking is Santa's job.

subtitles.original: You know, when... when Shishiron said you're not supposed to give free items to people,
subtitles.english: You know, when... when Shishiron said you're not supposed to give free items to people,

subtitles.original: I was like, "Oh, Santa can't give me another present anymore?"
subtitles.english: I was like, "Oh, Santa can't give me another present anymore?"

subtitles.original: But then I realized, it is actually Santa's job to give presents when I'm not looking.
subtitles.english: But then I realized, it is actually Santa's job to give presents when I'm not looking.

subtitles.original: Ho, ho, ho!
subtitles.english: Ho, ho, ho!

subtitles.original: Today is the last day of this event.
subtitles.english: Today is the last day of this event.

subtitles.original: いや、このタコダチ、ホロ鯖にもあったらいいな。
subtitles.english: Man, I wish this Takodachi was on the Holo Server too.

subtitles.original: 欲しい。
subtitles.english: I want it.

subtitles.original: でもホロ鯖は、なんかカスタムのアイテムあんまりないから...
subtitles.english: But the Holo Server doesn't really have custom items, so...

subtitles.original: いや、でもメンバーのマスコットくらいは大丈夫...大丈夫...大丈夫じゃないですか？運営さん？
subtitles.english: No, but at least the members' mascots should be okay... right, managers?

subtitles.original: I want the mascots in the Holo Server. But then, Holo Server doesn't have that many custom items, but then it's the members' mascots, so you know...
subtitles.english: I want the mascots in the Holo Server. But then, Holo Server doesn't have that many custom items, but then it's the members' mascots, so you know...

subtitles.original: You know?
subtitles.english: You know?

subtitles.original: Maybe they can make an exception?
subtitles.english: Maybe they can make an exception?

subtitles.original: いや、でも今考えたら、なんかメンバーの頭とかあったっけ？ホロ鯖に。
subtitles.english: But thinking about it now, did we have members' heads on the Holo Server?

subtitles.original: We do have the heads of the members and stuff, right? In the Holo Server.
subtitles.english: We do have the heads of the members and stuff, right? In the Holo Server.

subtitles.original: あった気がする。
subtitles.english: I feel like we had them.

subtitles.original: あ、でも、なんかマスコットは...まあ、作るために、お金かかるかもね。
subtitles.english: Ah, but maybe mascots... well, to make them, it might cost money.

subtitles.original: いや、でもなんか、持って帰ったらいいなと。
subtitles.english: But, still, it'd be nice to take them home.

subtitles.original: It would be nice to carry it back, but of course it takes the golden coins to create these assets.
subtitles.english: It would be nice to carry it back, but of course it takes the golden coins to create these assets.
